slides.title: One number that quietly *ages your brain*.
slides.sub: Homocysteine is an amino acid that rises silently. The good news: it is one of the more fixable markers you can test.

slides.title: Meet homocysteine
slides.body: Homocysteine is an amino acid your body makes. When it *climbs too high*, it is linked to damage in blood vessels and brain tissue.

slides.title: It touches heart and mind
slides.body: Elevated homocysteine is linked to *worse cardiovascular and cognitive health* over time. It tends to rise quietly with age.

slides.title: B-vitamins clear the path
slides.body: Your body uses B12, folate and B6 to *break homocysteine down*. When these run low, levels can drift upward.

slides.title: One blood test reveals it
slides.body: A simple homocysteine test shows where you stand. If it is high, the fix is often *food and targeted B-vitamins*.

slides.title: Feed the pathway
slides.body: Leafy greens, eggs, fish and legumes supply these B-vitamins. A doctor can confirm whether a *supplement may help* you.

slides.title: Small markers, *real leverage*.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns your sleep, food, movement and steps into one daily Health Score, so the habits behind markers like this stay on track.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Some of the biggest longevity wins hide in numbers you have never tested. Homocysteine is one of them. 🌿🧠

It is an amino acid that can quietly damage blood vessels and brain tissue when it climbs, and B12, folate and B6 can help bring it back down. One test points to a simple, fixable lever. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns the daily habits behind markers like this into one clear score → link in bio.
youtube_title: The Hidden Blood Marker That Ages Your Brain (and the Simple Fix)
